package rulecoverage

func NegativeGoPerfLayerProfilingBenchmarkingBenchmarkMissingAllocsReport() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_profiling_benchmarking_benchmark_missing_allocs_report"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Layer: Profiling and benchmarking. Flag benchmarks for allocation-sensitive code that omit b.ReportAllocs."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
